summary: Device registration is delayed for a test device
description:
Issue Summary:
Device registration is taking longer than expected during testing.
Environment:
Test
Steps:
Register a test device.
Verify registration status.
Expected Result:
Device should register within 30 seconds.
Actual Result:
Registration completed after approximately 2 minutes.
Purpose:
Created for Jira workflow testing.
Additional Verification:
Description updated after ticket closure to validate Jira to Git synchronization.
This change is intentionally added for testing incremental update detection.
